)	a.
    Read HTML file from formats data directory.
    Parameters
    ----------
    datapath : pytest fixture
        The datapath fixture injected into a test by pytest.
    name : str
        The name of the HTML file without the suffix.
    Returns
    -------
    str : contents of HTML file.
